overview.heroLead: Private by design. In your browser.
overview.heroTitle: Developer utilities, with no accounts or telemetry.
overview.heroText: LocalTools is a curated collection of developer utilities that run entirely in your browser. No accounts. No telemetry. Just reliable tools that respect your workflow and your data.

heroTrustItems.title: Open Source
heroTrustItems.description: Transparent by design. Built in the open.

heroTrustItems.title: Developer First
heroTrustItems.description: Fast, focused, and built for real workflows.

overview.storyLead: Free, ad-free, and account-free. A clean environment to solve technical microtasks without friction or noise.

storyItems.bodyPrimary: Convert formats and prepare deliverables in seconds.
storyItems.bodySecondary: Compress images, PDFs, or video without leaving the browser.

storyItems.bodyPrimary: Validate structures and clean payloads before sending.
storyItems.bodySecondary: Encode and decode values for APIs without mistakes.
Generate clean, copy-ready outputs for daily work.

storyItems.bodyPrimary: Handle daily technical microtasks with less friction.
storyItems.bodySecondary: Validate color, contrast, and gradients with direct controls.

storyItems.bodyPrimary: Copy or download results ready to share.
storyItems.bodySecondary: Chain steps with no accounts and no uploads.

section3Rows.descriptionPrimary: Format, validate, and convert data directly in your browser.
section3Rows.descriptionSecondary: Perfect for cleaning inputs before sending them to APIs.

section3Rows.descriptionPrimary: Debug, inspect, and interact with web services and content without leaving your machine.
section3Rows.descriptionSecondary: Ideal for validating URLs, payloads, and responses.

section3Rows.descriptionPrimary: Ship better code with helpers that speed up your daily development tasks.
section3Rows.descriptionSecondary: Built for documentation, text transformations, and practical copy-ready snippets.

section3Rows.descriptionPrimary: Small utilities with a big impact on your productivity, every single day.
section3Rows.descriptionSecondary: For those moments when you need a microtask solved in seconds, with no extra software.

overview.storyTitle: How this product is meant to be used
overview.storyP1: Most teams lose time on tiny operations that are too small for dedicated software but too frequent to ignore: format this payload, convert that file, generate this code-safe value, verify that color contrast, compress that PDF before sending it.
overview.storyP2: This page explains the platform as a narrative, not as a dashboard grid. You can scan it quickly, jump to relevant categories, and understand where each tool fits in a real delivery pipeline.
overview.chapterIntro: Each chapter groups tools by intent and gives context beyond one-line descriptions.
overview.horizontalTitle: Every active tool, in one moving strip
overview.horizontalHint: Scroll to explore all current modules.
overview.trustTitle: Your data never leaves your machine.
overview.trustBodyPrimary: LocalTools is built on a simple principle: you stay in control. No telemetry. No tracking. No accounts.
overview.trustBodySecondary: Just tools that work, even offline.

bottomCards.title: Built with developers, for developers.

overview.finalText: Feature requests, UX critiques, naming decisions, and bug reports are part of the evolution process. The roadmap stays practical and implementation-driven.
